        " fill="currentColor"></path></g></svg></div></div><div class="sc-epzHnm eSNgXu api-content"><div class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt api-info"><h1 class="sc-iCZwEW sc-kyZTxD jGyrsf ctLJgJ">Descript API<!-- --> </h1><p>Download OpenAPI specification<!-- -->:</p><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><div class="sc-fyEUpq hUHsjr"><div class="sc-jNXfOT jiFwNI"> <!-- --> <span class="sc-kwhYVV fjZpBB">License:<!-- --> <a href="https://www.descript.com/terms">Proprietary</a></span> </div></div></div><div data-role="redoc-summary" html="" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"></div><div data-role="redoc-description" html="&lt;p&gt;Descript API documentation.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>Descript API documentation.</p>
</div></div></div></div><div id="tag/Getting-started" data-section-id="tag/Getting-started" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Getting-started" aria-label="tag/Getting-started"></a>Getting started</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Early Access:&lt;/strong&gt; These APIs are still under active development, and may change and evolve over time. We&amp;#39;re thankful for your input, and excited to build with you.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;/blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The Descript API lets you programmatically create projects, import media, and edit your projects — all without opening the app.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;To learn more, visit &lt;a href=&quot;https://descript.com/api&quot;&gt;descript.com/api&lt;/a&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;
"><blockquote>
<p><strong>Early Access:</strong> These APIs are still under active development, and may change and evolve over time. We&#39;re thankful for your input, and excited to build with you.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>The Descript API lets you programmatically create projects, import media, and edit your projects — all without opening the app.</p>
<p>To learn more, visit <a href="https://descript.com/api">descript.com/api</a>.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Getting-started/Create-an-API-token" data-section-id="tag/Getting-started/Create-an-API-token" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Getting-started/Create-an-API-token" aria-label="tag/Getting-started/Create-an-API-token"></a>Create an API token</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;ol&gt;
&lt;li&gt;In Descript, open &lt;strong&gt;Settings&lt;/strong&gt; and select &lt;strong&gt;API tokens&lt;/strong&gt; from the sidebar. Then click &lt;strong&gt;Create token&lt;/strong&gt;.&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ol&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;img src=&quot;assets/token1.png&quot; alt=&quot;Navigate to Settings &amp;gt; API tokens and click Create token&quot;&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ol start=&quot;2&quot;&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Give your token a name and select the Drive it should be associated with. Click &lt;strong&gt;Create token&lt;/strong&gt;.&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ol&gt;
&lt;img src=&quot;assets/token2.png&quot; alt=&quot;Name your token and select a Drive&quot; width=&quot;500&quot; /&gt;

&lt;ol start=&quot;3&quot;&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Copy your token and store it in a safe place. You won&amp;#39;t be able to view it again. If you lose it, you&amp;#39;ll need to generate a new one.&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ol&gt;
&lt;img src=&quot;assets/token3.png&quot; alt=&quot;Copy and save your API token&quot; width=&quot;500&quot; /&gt;

&lt;blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Warning:&lt;/strong&gt; Treat your API token like a password. Anyone with your token can make API requests on your behalf using your account permissions. Never share your token publicly or commit it to source control.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;/blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Include the token as a Bearer token in the &lt;code&gt;Authorization&lt;/code&gt; header of your API requests.&lt;/p&gt;
"><ol>
<li>In Descript, open <strong>Settings</strong> and select <strong>API tokens</strong> from the sidebar. Then click <strong>Create token</strong>.</li>
</ol>
<p><img src="assets/token1.png" alt="Navigate to Settings &gt; API tokens and click Create token"></p>
<ol start="2">
<li>Give your token a name and select the Drive it should be associated with. Click <strong>Create token</strong>.</li>
</ol>
<img src="assets/token2.png" alt="Name your token and select a Drive" width="500" />

<ol start="3">
<li>Copy your token and store it in a safe place. You won&#39;t be able to view it again. If you lose it, you&#39;ll need to generate a new one.</li>
</ol>
<img src="assets/token3.png" alt="Copy and save your API token" width="500" />

<blockquote>
<p><strong>Warning:</strong> Treat your API token like a password. Anyone with your token can make API requests on your behalf using your account permissions. Never share your token publicly or commit it to source control.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Include the token as a Bearer token in the <code>Authorization</code> header of your API requests.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Getting-started/Import-media-into-a-new-project" data-section-id="tag/Getting-started/Import-media-into-a-new-project" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Getting-started/Import-media-into-a-new-project" aria-label="tag/Getting-started/Import-media-into-a-new-project"></a>Import media into a new project</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;You can create a new project, import media, and place the media into a composition all in one API request using the &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/importProjectMedia&quot;&gt;import endpoint&lt;/a&gt;. This step also transcribes and processes the media so that it&amp;#39;s ready for you or the agent to edit.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;To import files, pass in public or pre-signed URIs. Currently, the API does not support uploading a file directly. To test the API with an example file, use the demo video included in the sample request below.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Importing and processing is an asynchronous job, so the response payload will contain a &lt;code&gt;job_id&lt;/code&gt; for you to &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;query the status of the job&lt;/a&gt; and information about the newly created project. Note that &lt;code&gt;project_id&lt;/code&gt; and &lt;code&gt;project_url&lt;/code&gt; are returned immediately alongside &lt;code&gt;job_id&lt;/code&gt;, but opening the project in Descript will not always show the API&amp;#39;s processing state in real time. To prevent unintended changes, we recommend that you do not make any changes to the project until the job has stopped.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Request&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-X&lt;/span&gt; POST https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/import/project_media &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-d&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&#x27;{
    &quot;project_name&quot;: &quot;My First Video&quot;,
    &quot;add_media&quot;: {
      &quot;demo.mp4&quot;: {
        &quot;url&quot;: &quot;https://test-files.descriptapi.com/demo-video.mp4&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;add_compositions&quot;: [
      {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Demo Video&quot;,
        &quot;clips&quot;: [
          { &quot;media&quot;: &quot;demo.mp4&quot; }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }&#x27;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Response&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-json&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;project-media-import-9d635d5b&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;drive_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;c9c5c47e&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_url&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
"><p>You can create a new project, import media, and place the media into a composition all in one API request using the <a href="#operation/importProjectMedia">import endpoint</a>. This step also transcribes and processes the media so that it&#39;s ready for you or the agent to edit.</p>
<p>To import files, pass in public or pre-signed URIs. Currently, the API does not support uploading a file directly. To test the API with an example file, use the demo video included in the sample request below.</p>
<p>Importing and processing is an asynchronous job, so the response payload will contain a <code>job_id</code> for you to <a href="#operation/getJob">query the status of the job</a> and information about the newly created project. Note that <code>project_id</code> and <code>project_url</code> are returned immediately alongside <code>job_id</code>, but opening the project in Descript will not always show the API&#39;s processing state in real time. To prevent unintended changes, we recommend that you do not make any changes to the project until the job has stopped.</p>
<p><strong>Request</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> <span class="token parameter variable">-X</span> POST https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/import/project_media <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Content-Type: application/json"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-d</span> <span class="token string">'{
    "project_name": "My First Video",
    "add_media": {
      "demo.mp4": {
        "url": "https://test-files.descriptapi.com/demo-video.mp4"
      }
    },
    "add_compositions": [
      {
        "name": "Demo Video",
        "clips": [
          { "media": "demo.mp4" }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }'</span>
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Response</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-json"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"job_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"project-media-import-9d635d5b"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"drive_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"c9c5c47e"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_url"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6"</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></pre>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Getting-started/Check-for-import-completion" data-section-id="tag/Getting-started/Check-for-import-completion" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Getting-started/Check-for-import-completion" aria-label="tag/Getting-started/Check-for-import-completion"></a>Check for import completion</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Poll the &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;job status endpoint&lt;/a&gt; using the &lt;code&gt;job_id&lt;/code&gt; from the last step to check whether the import job is finished processing. When it is, you&amp;#39;ll see &lt;code&gt;job_state: &amp;quot;stopped&amp;quot;&lt;/code&gt;. You can then check the &lt;code&gt;results&lt;/code&gt; object to see its full results.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;You can also pass in a &lt;code&gt;callback_url&lt;/code&gt; as a part of the first import request, and we&amp;#39;ll ping you when the job has stopped with the same response payload.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Request&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/project-media-import-9d635d5b &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Response&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-json&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;project-media-import-9d635d5b&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_type&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;import/project_media&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_state&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;stopped&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_url&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;result&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;status&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;success&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;media_status&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;main.mp4&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
        &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;status&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;success&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
        &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;duration_seconds&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token number&quot;&gt;69.477006&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;created_compositions&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;[&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;f8e5088a-4d53-4aab-9d4f-c6624b7d7622&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;name&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Demo Video&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;]&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
"><p>Poll the <a href="#operation/getJob">job status endpoint</a> using the <code>job_id</code> from the last step to check whether the import job is finished processing. When it is, you&#39;ll see <code>job_state: &quot;stopped&quot;</code>. You can then check the <code>results</code> object to see its full results.</p>
<p>You can also pass in a <code>callback_url</code> as a part of the first import request, and we&#39;ll ping you when the job has stopped with the same response payload.</p>
<p><strong>Request</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/project-media-import-9d635d5b <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN"</span>
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Response</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-json"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"job_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"project-media-import-9d635d5b"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"job_type"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"import/project_media"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"job_state"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"stopped"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_url"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"result"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"status"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"media_status"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
      <span class="token string-property property">"main.mp4"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
        <span class="token string-property property">"status"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
        <span class="token string-property property">"duration_seconds"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token number">69.477006</span>
      <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"created_compositions"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
      <span class="token punctuation">{</span> <span class="token string-property property">"id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"f8e5088a-4d53-4aab-9d4f-c6624b7d7622"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string-property property">"name"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"Demo Video"</span> <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></pre>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Getting-started/Prompt-for-edits-with-Agent-Underlord" data-section-id="tag/Getting-started/Prompt-for-edits-with-Agent-Underlord" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Getting-started/Prompt-for-edits-with-Agent-Underlord" aria-label="tag/Getting-started/Prompt-for-edits-with-Agent-Underlord"></a>Prompt for edits with Agent Underlord</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Once your media is imported, you can use the &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/agentEditJob&quot;&gt;agent edit endpoint&lt;/a&gt; to prompt Underlord for edits, just as you would in the app. Because it&amp;#39;s an API, conversation and follow up questions aren&amp;#39;t practical. So we recommend framing your edits as a one-shot prompt with all the information the agent needs.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Editing can take some time, so the response also returns a &lt;code&gt;job_id&lt;/code&gt; that you can use to &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;check the status of the job&lt;/a&gt;. You can also pass in a &lt;code&gt;callback_url&lt;/code&gt; as a part of an agent request, and we&amp;#39;ll ping you when the job has stopped.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Request&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-X&lt;/span&gt; POST https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/agent &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-d&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&#x27;{
    &quot;project_id&quot;: &quot;e2f89ce6&quot;,
    &quot;prompt&quot;: &quot;Add studio sound and captions&quot;
  }&#x27;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Response&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-json&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;project-agent-edit-e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;drive_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;c9c5c47e&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_url&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
"><p>Once your media is imported, you can use the <a href="#operation/agentEditJob">agent edit endpoint</a> to prompt Underlord for edits, just as you would in the app. Because it&#39;s an API, conversation and follow up questions aren&#39;t practical. So we recommend framing your edits as a one-shot prompt with all the information the agent needs.</p>
<p>Editing can take some time, so the response also returns a <code>job_id</code> that you can use to <a href="#operation/getJob">check the status of the job</a>. You can also pass in a <code>callback_url</code> as a part of an agent request, and we&#39;ll ping you when the job has stopped.</p>
<p><strong>Request</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> <span class="token parameter variable">-X</span> POST https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/agent <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Content-Type: application/json"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-d</span> <span class="token string">'{
    "project_id": "e2f89ce6",
    "prompt": "Add studio sound and captions"
  }'</span>
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Response</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-json"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"job_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"project-agent-edit-e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"drive_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"c9c5c47e"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_url"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6"</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></pre>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Getting-started/Wait-for-the-agent-to-complete-its-job" data-section-id="tag/Getting-started/Wait-for-the-agent-to-complete-its-job" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Getting-started/Wait-for-the-agent-to-complete-its-job" aria-label="tag/Getting-started/Wait-for-the-agent-to-complete-its-job"></a>Wait for the agent to complete its job</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Poll the &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;job status endpoint&lt;/a&gt; using the &lt;code&gt;job_id&lt;/code&gt;. When the agent job completes successfully, the response includes a summary of what it accomplished (see the &lt;code&gt;result.agent_response&lt;/code&gt; field). Use the project URL to open the project in Descript and review Underlord&amp;#39;s changes.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Request&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/project-agent-edit-e2f89ce6 &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Once the agent job is successfully complete, you’ll see a response from the agent with a brief summary of what it accomplished. You can then use the project url to review its changes directly in Descript.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Response&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-json&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;project-agent-edit-e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_type&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;agent&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;YOUR_PROJECT_ID&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_url&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_state&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;stopped&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;created_at&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;2026-02-09T05:42:27.554Z&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;stopped_at&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;2026-02-09T05:43:15.296Z&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;drive_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;1df135a5-dc4a-4dc3-8f7d-681cfbe961e4&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;result&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
        &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;status&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;success&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;agent_response&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Done! I&#x27;ve applied Studio Sound to enhance your audio quality and added classic karaoke-style captions to your video.&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
        &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_changed&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token boolean&quot;&gt;true&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
        &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;media_seconds_used&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token number&quot;&gt;0&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
        &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;ai_credits_used&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token number&quot;&gt;32&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
"><p>Poll the <a href="#operation/getJob">job status endpoint</a> using the <code>job_id</code>. When the agent job completes successfully, the response includes a summary of what it accomplished (see the <code>result.agent_response</code> field). Use the project URL to open the project in Descript and review Underlord&#39;s changes.</p>
<p><strong>Request</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/project-agent-edit-e2f89ce6 <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN"</span>
</code></pre>
<p>Once the agent job is successfully complete, you’ll see a response from the agent with a brief summary of what it accomplished. You can then use the project url to review its changes directly in Descript.</p>
<p><strong>Response</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-json"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"job_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"project-agent-edit-e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"job_type"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"agent"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"YOUR_PROJECT_ID"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"project_url"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"job_state"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"stopped"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"created_at"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"2026-02-09T05:42:27.554Z"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"stopped_at"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"2026-02-09T05:43:15.296Z"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"drive_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"1df135a5-dc4a-4dc3-8f7d-681cfbe961e4"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"result"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
        <span class="token string-property property">"status"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"agent_response"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token string">"Done! I've applied Studio Sound to enhance your audio quality and added classic karaoke-style captions to your video."</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
        <span class="token string-property property">"project_changed"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token boolean">true</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
        <span class="token string-property property">"media_seconds_used"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
        <span class="token string-property property">"ai_credits_used"</span><span class="token operator">:</span><span class="token number">32</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></pre>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Using-the-CLI" data-section-id="tag/Using-the-CLI" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Using-the-CLI" aria-label="tag/Using-the-CLI"></a>Using the CLI</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;The CLI wraps the API into a simple to use command line tool with interactive flows for setting up authentication, importing, and prompting the agent. It also has built-in polling for job completion.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>The CLI wraps the API into a simple to use command line tool with interactive flows for setting up authentication, importing, and prompting the agent. It also has built-in polling for job completion.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Using-the-CLI/Requirements" data-section-id="tag/Using-the-CLI/Requirements" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Using-the-CLI/Requirements" aria-label="tag/Using-the-CLI/Requirements"></a>Requirements</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Before installing the CLI, you&amp;#39;ll need &lt;strong&gt;Node.js 24 or higher&lt;/strong&gt;. Visit &lt;a href=&quot;https://nodejs.org/&quot;&gt;nodejs.org&lt;/a&gt; to download and install the latest LTS version for your operating system.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>Before installing the CLI, you&#39;ll need <strong>Node.js 24 or higher</strong>. Visit <a href="https://nodejs.org/">nodejs.org</a> to download and install the latest LTS version for your operating system.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Using-the-CLI/Install-and-set-up" data-section-id="tag/Using-the-CLI/Install-and-set-up" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Using-the-CLI/Install-and-set-up" aria-label="tag/Using-the-CLI/Install-and-set-up"></a>Install and set up</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;First, install the latest version of the CLI using npm.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;npm&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;install&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-g&lt;/span&gt; @descript/platform-cli@latest
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Next, configure the CLI with your API key.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;descript-api config &lt;span class=&quot;token builtin class-name&quot;&gt;set&lt;/span&gt; api-key
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;img src=&quot;assets/cli-set-up.gif&quot; alt=&quot;Setting up the CLI&quot;&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>First, install the latest version of the CLI using npm.</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">npm</span> <span class="token function">install</span> <span class="token parameter variable">-g</span> @descript/platform-cli@latest
</code></pre>
<p>Next, configure the CLI with your API key.</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">descript-api config <span class="token builtin class-name">set</span> api-key
</code></pre>
<p><img src="assets/cli-set-up.gif" alt="Setting up the CLI"></p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Using-the-CLI/Import-media" data-section-id="tag/Using-the-CLI/Import-media" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Using-the-CLI/Import-media" aria-label="tag/Using-the-CLI/Import-media"></a>Import media</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Use the &lt;code&gt;import&lt;/code&gt; command to create a project by passing a project name and the link to any media you want to upload, or run &lt;code&gt;descript-api import&lt;/code&gt; for interactive mode. The CLI shows live progress and outputs the project ID when done.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;descript-api &lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;import&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;--name&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;My First Project&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;--media&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://test-files.descriptapi.com/demo-video.mp4&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;img src=&quot;assets/cli-import.gif&quot; alt=&quot;Interactive CLI import&quot;&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>Use the <code>import</code> command to create a project by passing a project name and the link to any media you want to upload, or run <code>descript-api import</code> for interactive mode. The CLI shows live progress and outputs the project ID when done.</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">descript-api <span class="token function">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">--name</span> <span class="token string">"My First Project"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">--media</span> <span class="token string">"https://test-files.descriptapi.com/demo-video.mp4"</span>
</code></pre>
<p><img src="assets/cli-import.gif" alt="Interactive CLI import"></p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Using-the-CLI/Use-the-agent" data-section-id="tag/Using-the-CLI/Use-the-agent" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Using-the-CLI/Use-the-agent" aria-label="tag/Using-the-CLI/Use-the-agent"></a>Use the agent</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Use the &lt;code&gt;agent&lt;/code&gt; command to edit a project by passing in the project id and an Underlord prompt.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;descript-api agent &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  --project-id YOUR_PROJECT_ID &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;--prompt&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Remove filler words and add Studio Sound to all clips&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;You can also ask Underlord create a new project from a prompt alone by writing the script for you!&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;descript-api edit &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;--new&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;--prompt&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Write a script about how to make great coffee&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
"><p>Use the <code>agent</code> command to edit a project by passing in the project id and an Underlord prompt.</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">descript-api agent <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  --project-id YOUR_PROJECT_ID <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">--prompt</span> <span class="token string">"Remove filler words and add Studio Sound to all clips"</span>
</code></pre>
<p>You can also ask Underlord create a new project from a prompt alone by writing the script for you!</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">descript-api edit <span class="token parameter variable">--new</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">--prompt</span> <span class="token string">"Write a script about how to make great coffee"</span>
</code></pre>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Using-the-CLI/All-commands" data-section-id="tag/Using-the-CLI/All-commands" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Using-the-CLI/All-commands" aria-label="tag/Using-the-CLI/All-commands"></a>All commands</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Run &lt;code&gt;descript-api help&lt;/code&gt; to see the full list of available commands and options.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>Run <code>descript-api help</code> to see the full list of available commands and options.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/API-Endpoints" data-section-id="tag/API-Endpoints" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/API-Endpoints" aria-label="tag/API-Endpoints"></a>API Endpoints</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Import media, edit projects with AI, and query jobs and projects.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>Import media, edit projects with AI, and query jobs and projects.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/importProjectMedia" data-section-id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/importProjectMedia" class="sc-dsLQwm kcRA-dj"><div data-section-id="operation/importProjectMedia" id="operation/importProjectMedia" class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/API-Endpoints/operation/importProjectMedia" aria-label="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/importProjectMedia"></a>Import media and sequences<!-- --> </h2><div class="sc-bQEQyQ iylDES"><div html="&lt;p&gt;Import media files into a new or existing project and create compositions.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;This endpoint can:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Create a new project if &lt;code&gt;project_id&lt;/code&gt; is not provided&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Import media files from URLs&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Create multitrack sequences&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Create compositions (timelines) from existing or new media in the project&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Trigger transcription and other background processing tasks&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;media-url-requirements&quot;&gt;Media URL requirements&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;URLs must be accessible by Descript servers&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;URLs must support HTTP Range requests&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Recommended to sign URLs for 12-48 hours to reduce chance of failure&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;a href=&quot;https://help.descript.com/hc/en-us/articles/10164098416909-Supported-file-types&quot;&gt;Supported file types&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;direct-file-upload&quot;&gt;Direct file upload&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Instead of providing a URL, you can upload files directly by specifying &lt;code&gt;content_type&lt;/code&gt; and &lt;code&gt;file_size&lt;/code&gt; for a media item. The response will include a signed &lt;code&gt;upload_url&lt;/code&gt; for each direct upload item. PUT the file bytes to that URL, and the import job will process it automatically. See the &lt;a href=&quot;#tag/Direct-file-upload&quot;&gt;Direct file upload&lt;/a&gt; guide for a full walkthrough.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;async-operations&quot;&gt;Async Operations&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Imports run in the background and return a &lt;code&gt;job_id&lt;/code&gt;. Monitor progress via the &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;GET /jobs/{job_id}&lt;/a&gt; endpoint.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;dynamic-webhook&quot;&gt;Dynamic webhook&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;If &lt;code&gt;callback_url&lt;/code&gt; is provided, Descript will POST the job status to that URL when the job finishes (successfully or not).&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The payload will match the format returned by &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;GET /jobs/{job_id}&lt;/a&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>Import media files into a new or existing project and create compositions.</p>
<p>This endpoint can:</p>
<ul>
<li>Create a new project if <code>project_id</code> is not provided</li>
<li>Import media files from URLs</li>
<li>Create multitrack sequences</li>
<li>Create compositions (timelines) from existing or new media in the project</li>
<li>Trigger transcription and other background processing tasks</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="media-url-requirements">Media URL requirements</h3>
<ul>
<li>URLs must be accessible by Descript servers</li>
<li>URLs must support HTTP Range requests</li>
<li>Recommended to sign URLs for 12-48 hours to reduce chance of failure</li>
<li><a href="https://help.descript.com/hc/en-us/articles/10164098416909-Supported-file-types">Supported file types</a></li>
</ul>
<h3 id="direct-file-upload">Direct file upload</h3>
<p>Instead of providing a URL, you can upload files directly by specifying <code>content_type</code> and <code>file_size</code> for a media item. The response will include a signed <code>upload_url</code> for each direct upload item. PUT the file bytes to that URL, and the import job will process it automatically. See the <a href="#tag/Direct-file-upload">Direct file upload</a> guide for a full walkthrough.</p>
<h3 id="async-operations">Async Operations</h3>
<p>Imports run in the background and return a <code>job_id</code>. Monitor progress via the <a href="#operation/getJob">GET /jobs/{job_id}</a> endpoint.</p>
<h3 id="dynamic-webhook">Dynamic webhook</h3>
<p>If <code>callback_url</code> is provided, Descript will POST the job status to that URL when the job finishes (successfully or not).</p>
<p>The payload will match the format returned by <a href="#operation/getJob">GET /jobs/{job_id}</a>.</p>
</div></div><div class="sc-iWlrxG dtXtLd"><div class="sc-iRFtIJ fWpKsT"><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt sc-hWiVxH gwrByh hWyQJJ">Authorizations:</h5><svg class="sc-cBYhjr dJanPw" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></div><div class="sc-jRHPII vWkRk"><span class="sc-jHofgq wBUJC"><span class="sc-iHlJgr dmsgXw"><i>bearerAuth</i></span></span></div></div><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt gwrByh">Request Body schema: <span class="sc-dwYcXH fafqZb">application/json</span><div class="sc-xuUkR sc-hrDJJk sc-dCKixA bJcEcT gLEAmN jBQHJa">required</div></h5><div html="&lt;p&gt;Media import and project creation request&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>Media import and project creation request</p>
</div><table class="sc-dENhDJ ceVHDP"><tbody><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="project_id" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">project_id</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->uuid<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;[Work in progress]&lt;/strong&gt; Importing into an existing project is not yet supported. Currently, a new project is always created.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Existing project ID to import media into. If not provided, a new project will be created.
When importing into an existing project, media filenames must not conflict with existing files.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p><strong>[Work in progress]</strong> Importing into an existing project is not yet supported. Currently, a new project is always created.</p>
<p>Existing project ID to import media into. If not provided, a new project will be created.
When importing into an existing project, media filenames must not conflict with existing files.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="project_name" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">project_name</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Name for the new project. Only used when project_id is not provided.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Name for the new project. Only used when project_id is not provided.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="team_access" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">team_access</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span></div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR bJcEcT"> <!-- -->Default:<!-- --> </span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;none&quot;</span></div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR bJcEcT"> <!-- -->Enum<!-- -->:</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;edit&quot;</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;comment&quot;</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;view&quot;</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;none&quot;</span> </div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Access level for drive members. Only applicable when creating a new project
(when project_id is not provided). Defaults to &lt;code&gt;none&lt;/code&gt; if not specified.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;edit: Users can edit the project&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;comment: Users can view and comment but not edit&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;view: Users can view but not comment or edit&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;none: No shared access (private to owner)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Access level for drive members. Only applicable when creating a new project
(when project_id is not provided). Defaults to <code>none</code> if not specified.</p>
<ul>
<li>edit: Users can edit the project</li>
<li>comment: Users can view and comment but not edit</li>
<li>view: Users can view but not comment or edit</li>
<li>none: No shared access (private to owner)</li>
</ul>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="add_media" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt sc-hxyskk kyrkfq bUksBx iDNWxx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><button aria-label="expand add_media"><span class="property-name">add_media</span><svg class="sc-cBYhjr MHxpd" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></button></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">object</span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Map of media reference IDs (display names with optional folder paths) to media import items.
Keys are the display names that will appear in the project (e.g., &amp;quot;Misc/intro.mp4&amp;quot; or &amp;quot;demo.mp4&amp;quot;).
Values define how to import each media item (URL import or multitrack sequence).&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Map of media reference IDs (display names with optional folder paths) to media import items.

Descript will POST the job status (same format as <a href="#operation/getJob">GET /jobs/{job_id}</a>) to this URL.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table><div><h3 class="sc-gmSqAz eExJTr">Responses</h3><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa kzxcfX"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr fqtTpb" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">201<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Import job created successfully&lt;/p&gt;

</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">400<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Invalid input:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Malformed request body&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Invalid media URLs&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;URLs not accessible or don&amp;#39;t support Range requests&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Media filename conflicts with existing files (when importing to existing project)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Invalid input:</p>
<ul>
<li>Malformed request body</li>
<li>Invalid media URLs</li>
<li>URLs not accessible or don&#39;t support Range requests</li>
<li>Media filename conflicts with existing files (when importing to existing project)</li>
</ul>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">401<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Unauthorized - missing or invalid authentication token&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Unauthorized - missing or invalid authentication token</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">402<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Payment Required - insufficient media minutes to start the job&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Payment Required - insufficient media minutes to start the job</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">403<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Forbidden - user does not have access to this resource&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Forbidden - user does not have access to this resource</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">404<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Not found:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Drive doesn&amp;#39;t exist&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Project doesn&amp;#39;t exist (when project_id is provided)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Not found:</p>
<ul>
<li>Drive doesn&#39;t exist</li>
<li>Project doesn&#39;t exist (when project_id is provided)</li>
</ul>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">429<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the &lt;code&gt;Retry-After&lt;/code&gt; header to determine when to retry.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the <code>Retry-After</code> header to determine when to retry.</p>
</div></button></div></div></div><div class="sc-iKTcqh sc-gnpbhQ gZDnYl ilOHuQ"><div class="sc-eowDPD gzfevj"><button class="sc-oeqTF kUpURr"><span type="post" class="sc-ezTrPE iTvTLp http-verb post">post</span><span class="sc-iAlELC fnjHPf">/jobs/import/project_media</span><svg class="sc-cBYhjr iMxoRf" style="margin-right:-25px" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="sc-drnuxz cBFiuk"><div class="sc-hDcvty foSvWH"><div html="" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"></div><div tabindex="0" role="button"><div class="sc-kGqRax bAnzrw"><span>https://descriptapi.com/v1</span>/jobs/import/project_media</div></div></div></div></div><div><h3 class="sc-kkmypM jKNCPF"> <!-- -->Request samples<!-- --> </h3><div class="sc-bSlUec eiAsom" data-rttabs="true"><ul class="react-tabs__tab-list" role="tablist"><li class="react-tabs__tab react-tabs__tab--selected" role="tab" id="tab:Riicsq:0" aria-selected="true" aria-disabled="false" aria-controls="panel:Riicsq:0" tabindex="0" data-rttab="true">Payload</li></ul><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel react-tabs__tab-panel--selected" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Riicsq:0" aria-labelledby="tab:Riicsq:0"><div><div class="sc-WChnI iLXIA-d"><span class="sc-foMnoT eIkhHQ">Content type</span><div class="sc-ZubPq hQugjE">application/json</div></div><div class="sc-AmOMz gDrQpr"><div class="sc-WChnI iLXIA-d"><span class="sc-foMnoT eIkhHQ">Example</span><div class="sc-dorvvM sc-flUsNl kCwmta dudJXz"><svg class="sc-kTYLvb FdjRy" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline></svg><select class="dropdown-select"><option value="Create project with initial composition" selected="">Create project with initial composition</option><option value="Import media without composition">Import media without composition</option><option value="Direct file upload">Direct file upload</option><option value="Create multitrack sequence">Create multitrack sequence</option></select><label>Create project with initial composition</label></div></div><div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Most common use case for seeding a project with a simple composition&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>Most common use case for seeding a project with a simple composition</p>
</div><div class="sc-eTdEpr dgzSkD"><div class="sc-pFPEP hYOPWb"><button><div class="sc-eHujzY ecCAmX">Copy</div></button><button> Expand all </button><button> Collapse all </button></div><div class="token punctuation">}</span></code></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjicsq:1" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjicsq:1"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjicsq:2" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjicsq:2"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjicsq:3" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjicsq:3"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjicsq:4" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjicsq:4"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjicsq:5" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjicsq:5"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjicsq:6" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjicsq:6"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/agentEditJob" data-section-id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/agentEditJob" class="sc-dsLQwm kcRA-dj"><div data-section-id="operation/agentEditJob" id="operation/agentEditJob" class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/API-Endpoints/operation/agentEditJob" aria-label="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/agentEditJob"></a>Agent edit<!-- --> </h2><div class="sc-bQEQyQ iylDES"><div html="&lt;p&gt;Use a background agent to create and edit projects using a natural language prompt.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Edit existing project&lt;/strong&gt;: Provide a &lt;code&gt;project_id&lt;/code&gt; to edit an existing project&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Create new project&lt;/strong&gt;: Provide a &lt;code&gt;project_name&lt;/code&gt; instead of &lt;code&gt;project_id&lt;/code&gt; to create a new project&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;common-use-cases&quot;&gt;Common use cases&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Create new content: &amp;quot;create a 30-second video about cooking tips&amp;quot;&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Apply audio effects: &amp;quot;add studio sound to every clip&amp;quot;&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Remove filler words: &amp;quot;remove all filler words from the transcript&amp;quot;&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Create highlights: &amp;quot;create a 30-second highlight reel&amp;quot;&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Content editing: &amp;quot;remove the section from 1:30 to 2:15&amp;quot;&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;async-operations&quot;&gt;Async Operations&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Agent edits run in the background and return a &lt;code&gt;job_id&lt;/code&gt;. Monitor progress via the &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;GET /jobs/{job_id}&lt;/a&gt; endpoint.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;dynamic-webhook&quot;&gt;Dynamic webhook&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;If &lt;code&gt;callback_url&lt;/code&gt; is provided, Descript will POST the job status to that URL when the job completes or fails.
The payload will match the format returned by &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;GET /jobs/{job_id}&lt;/a&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>Use a background agent to create and edit projects using a natural language prompt.</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Edit existing project</strong>: Provide a <code>project_id</code> to edit an existing project</li>
<li><strong>Create new project</strong>: Provide a <code>project_name</code> instead of <code>project_id</code> to create a new project</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="common-use-cases">Common use cases</h3>
<ul>
<li>Create new content: &quot;create a 30-second video about cooking tips&quot;</li>
<li>Apply audio effects: &quot;add studio sound to every clip&quot;</li>
<li>Remove filler words: &quot;remove all filler words from the transcript&quot;</li>
<li>Create highlights: &quot;create a 30-second highlight reel&quot;</li>
<li>Content editing: &quot;remove the section from 1:30 to 2:15&quot;</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="async-operations">Async Operations</h3>
<p>Agent edits run in the background and return a <code>job_id</code>. Monitor progress via the <a href="#operation/getJob">GET /jobs/{job_id}</a> endpoint.</p>
<h3 id="dynamic-webhook">Dynamic webhook</h3>
<p>If <code>callback_url</code> is provided, Descript will POST the job status to that URL when the job completes or fails.
The payload will match the format returned by <a href="#operation/getJob">GET /jobs/{job_id}</a>.</p>
</div></div><div class="sc-iWlrxG dtXtLd"><div class="sc-iRFtIJ fWpKsT"><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt sc-hWiVxH gwrByh hWyQJJ">Authorizations:</h5><svg class="sc-cBYhjr dJanPw" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></div><div class="sc-jRHPII vWkRk"><span class="sc-jHofgq wBUJC"><span class="sc-iHlJgr dmsgXw"><i>bearerAuth</i></span></span></div></div><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt gwrByh">Request Body schema: <span class="sc-dwYcXH fafqZb">application/json</span><div class="sc-xuUkR sc-hrDJJk sc-dCKixA bJcEcT gLEAmN jBQHJa">required</div></h5><div html="&lt;p&gt;AI agent request&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>AI agent request</p>
</div><table class="sc-dENhDJ ceVHDP"><tbody><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="project_id" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">project_id</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->uuid<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;The ID of an existing project to edit. Mutually exclusive with &lt;code&gt;project_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>The ID of an existing project to edit. Mutually exclusive with <code>project_name</code>.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="project_name" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">project_name</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Name for creating a new project. Mutually exclusive with &lt;code&gt;project_id&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Name for creating a new project. Mutually exclusive with <code>project_id</code>.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="composition_id" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">composition_id</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->uuid<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;[Work in progress]&lt;/strong&gt; This property is accepted but not yet functional. It will be ignored.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Optional composition ID within the project to edit.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p><strong>[Work in progress]</strong> This property is accepted but not yet functional. It will be ignored.</p>
<p>Optional composition ID within the project to edit.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="model" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">model</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;AI model to use for editing. Defaults to the default model.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>AI model to use for editing. Defaults to the default model.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="prompt" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">prompt</span><div class="sc-xuUkR sc-hrDJJk bJcEcT gLEAmN">required</div></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Natural language instruction for the agent to execute.
Examples: &amp;quot;add studio sound to every clip&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;remove all filler words&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;create a 30-second highlight reel&amp;quot;&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Natural language instruction for the agent to execute.
Examples: &quot;add studio sound to every clip&quot;, &quot;remove all filler words&quot;, &quot;create a 30-second highlight reel&quot;</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="team_access" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">team_access</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span></div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR bJcEcT"> <!-- -->Enum<!-- -->:</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;edit&quot;</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;comment&quot;</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;view&quot;</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;none&quot;</span> </div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Access level for team members when creating a new project.
Only applicable when &lt;code&gt;project_name&lt;/code&gt; is provided (not when using &lt;code&gt;project_id&lt;/code&gt;).
Defaults to &lt;code&gt;none&lt;/code&gt; if not specified.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Access level for team members when creating a new project.
Only applicable when <code>project_name</code> is provided (not when using <code>project_id</code>).
Defaults to <code>none</code> if not specified.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class="last "><td kind="field" title="callback_url" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">callback_url</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->uri<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Optional webhook URL to call when the job completes or fails.
Descript will POST the job status (same format as &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;GET /jobs/{job_id}&lt;/a&gt;) to this URL.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Optional webhook URL to call when the job completes or fails.
Descript will POST the job status (same format as <a href="#operation/getJob">GET /jobs/{job_id}</a>) to this URL.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table><div><h3 class="sc-gmSqAz eExJTr">Responses</h3><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa kzxcfX"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr fqtTpb" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">201<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Agent edit job created successfully&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Agent edit job created successfully</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">400<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Invalid input:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Malformed request body&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Invalid project_id or composition_id&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Empty or invalid prompt&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Invalid input:</p>
<ul>
<li>Malformed request body</li>
<li>Invalid project_id or composition_id</li>
<li>Empty or invalid prompt</li>
</ul>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">401<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Unauthorized - missing or invalid authentication token&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Unauthorized - missing or invalid authentication token</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">402<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Payment Required - insufficient AI credits to start the job&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Payment Required - insufficient AI credits to start the job</p>
