&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Project doesn&amp;#39;t exist&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Composition doesn&amp;#39;t exist (when composition_id is provided)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Not found:</p>
<ul>
<li>Project doesn&#39;t exist</li>
<li>Composition doesn&#39;t exist (when composition_id is provided)</li>
</ul>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">429<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the &lt;code&gt;Retry-After&lt;/code&gt; header to determine when to retry.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the <code>Retry-After</code> header to determine when to retry.</p>
</div></button></div></div></div><div class="sc-iKTcqh sc-gnpbhQ gZDnYl ilOHuQ"><div class="sc-eowDPD gzfevj"><button class="sc-oeqTF kUpURr"><span type="post" class="sc-ezTrPE iTvTLp http-verb aria-controls="panel:Rjiksq:5" data-rttab="true">429</li></ul><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel react-tabs__tab-panel--selected" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjiksq:0" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjiksq:0"><div><div class="sc-WChnI iLXIA-d"><span class="sc-foMnoT eIkhHQ">Content type</span><div class="sc-ZubPq hQugjE">application/json</div></div><div class="sc-AmOMz gDrQpr"><div class="sc-eTdEpr dgzSkD"><div class="sc-pFPEP hYOPWb"><button><div class="sc-eHujzY ecCAmX">Copy</div></button></div><div tabindex="0" class="sc-euGpHm fwfkcU sc-fTgapq bDqsIm"><div class="redoc-json"><code><button class="collapser" aria-label="collapse"></button><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="ellipsis"></span><ul class="obj collapsible"><li><div class="hoverable "><span class="property token string">"job_id"</span>: <span class="token string">&quot;6dc3f30a-58c2-4174-96a6-dc18cf3c7776&quot;</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span></div></li><li><div class="hoverable "><span class="property token string">"drive_id"</span>: <span class="token string">&quot;c9c5c47e-158a-49f7-846b-4f6ee2a229a2&quot;</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span></div></li><li><div class="hoverable "><span class="property token string">"project_id"</span>: <span class="token string">&quot;9f36ee32-5a2c-47e7-b1a3-94991d3e3ddb&quot;</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span></div></li><li><div class="hoverable "><span class="property token string">"project_url"</span>: <span class="token string">&quot;</span><a href="https://web.descript.com/9f36ee32-5a2c-47e7-b1a3-94991d3e3ddb">https://web.descript.com/9f36ee32-5a2c-47e7-b1a3-94991d3e3ddb</a><span class="token string">&quot;</span></div></li></ul><span class="token punctuation">}</span></code></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjiksq:1" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjiksq:1"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjiksq:2" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjiksq:2"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjiksq:3" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjiksq:3"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjiksq:4" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjiksq:4"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjiksq:5" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjiksq:5"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/listJobs" data-section-id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/listJobs" class="sc-dsLQwm kcRA-dj"><div data-section-id="operation/listJobs" id="operation/listJobs" class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/API-Endpoints/operation/listJobs" aria-label="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/listJobs"></a>List jobs<!-- --> </h2><div class="sc-bQEQyQ iylDES"><div html="&lt;p&gt;List recent jobs with optional filtering by project or job type.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;By default, jobs created within the last 7 days are returned. Use &lt;code&gt;created_after&lt;/code&gt; and
&lt;code&gt;created_before&lt;/code&gt; to customize the time range. The maximum lookback is 30 days.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Results are paginated. Use the &lt;code&gt;cursor&lt;/code&gt; from the response &lt;code&gt;pagination.next_cursor&lt;/code&gt; to
fetch subsequent pages.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Query parameters allow you to filter the results:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Filter by &lt;code&gt;project_id&lt;/code&gt; to see all jobs for a project&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Filter by &lt;code&gt;type&lt;/code&gt; to see specific job types (import/project_media, agent)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>List recent jobs with optional filtering by project or job type.</p>
<p>By default, jobs created within the last 7 days are returned. Use <code>created_after</code> and
<code>created_before</code> to customize the time range. The maximum lookback is 30 days.</p>
<p>Results are paginated. Use the <code>cursor</code> from the response <code>pagination.next_cursor</code> to
fetch subsequent pages.</p>
<p>Query parameters allow you to filter the results:</p>
<ul>
<li>Filter by <code>project_id</code> to see all jobs for a project</li>
<li>Filter by <code>type</code> to see specific job types (import/project_media, agent)</li>
</ul>
</div></div><div class="sc-iWlrxG dtXtLd"><div class="sc-iRFtIJ fWpKsT"><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt sc-hWiVxH gwrByh hWyQJJ">Authorizations:</h5><svg class="sc-cBYhjr dJanPw" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></div><div class="sc-jRHPII vWkRk"><span class="sc-jHofgq wBUJC"><span class="sc-iHlJgr dmsgXw"><i>bearerAuth</i></span></span></div></div><div><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt gwrByh">query<!-- --> Parameters</h5><table class="sc-dENhDJ ceVHDP"><tbody><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="project_id" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">project_id</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->uuid<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Filter by project ID&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Filter by project ID</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="type" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">type</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span></div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR bJcEcT"> <!-- -->Enum<!-- -->:</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;import/project_media&quot;</span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">&quot;agent&quot;</span> </div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Filter by job type&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Filter by job type</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="cursor" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">cursor</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Cursor for the next page of results, obtained from &lt;code&gt;pagination.next_cursor&lt;/code&gt; in a previous response&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Cursor for the next page of results, obtained from <code>pagination.next_cursor</code> in a previous response</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="limit" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">limit</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">integer</span><span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-fsKlOa bJcEcT hqZVFs"> <!-- -->[ 1 .. 100 ]<!-- --> </span></span></div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR bJcEcT"> <!-- -->Default:<!-- --> </span> <span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cDelgQ bJcEcT cGSSRI">20</span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Number of items per page (1-100). Defaults to 20.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Number of items per page (1-100). Defaults to 20.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class=""><td kind="field" title="created_after" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">created_after</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->date-time<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Filter jobs created after this timestamp (ISO 8601). Default: 7 days ago. Oldest allowed: 30 days ago.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Filter jobs created after this timestamp (ISO 8601). Default: 7 days ago. Oldest allowed: 30 days ago.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class="last "><td kind="field" title="created_before" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">created_before</span></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->date-time<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;Filter jobs created before this timestamp (ISO 8601). Default: now.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>Filter jobs created before this timestamp (ISO 8601). Default: now.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div><h3 class="sc-gmSqAz eExJTr">Responses</h3><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa kzxcfX"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr fqtTpb" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">200<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Jobs list retrieved successfully&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Jobs list retrieved successfully</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">401<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication token&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication token</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">429<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the &lt;code&gt;Retry-After&lt;/code&gt; header to determine when to retry.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the <code>Retry-After</code> header to determine when to retry.</p>
</div></button></div></div></div><div class="sc-iKTcqh sc-gnpbhQ gZDnYl ilOHuQ"><div class="sc-eowDPD gzfevj"><button class="sc-oeqTF kUpURr"><span type="get" class="sc-ezTrPE kSShLn http-verb get">get</span><span class="sc-iAlELC fnjHPf">/jobs</span><svg class="sc-cBYhjr iMxoRf" style="margin-right:-25px" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="sc-drnuxz cBFiuk"><div class="sc-hDcvty foSvWH"><div data-section-id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/getJob" class="sc-dsLQwm kcRA-dj"><div data-section-id="operation/getJob" id="operation/getJob" class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/API-Endpoints/operation/getJob" aria-label="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/getJob"></a>Get job status<!-- --> </h2><div class="sc-bQEQyQ iylDES"><div html="&lt;p&gt;Retrieve the status of any job.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The response format varies based on job type and includes type-specific fields.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>Retrieve the status of any job.</p>
<p>The response format varies based on job type and includes type-specific fields.</p>
</div></div><div class="sc-iWlrxG dtXtLd"><div class="sc-iRFtIJ fWpKsT"><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt sc-hWiVxH gwrByh hWyQJJ">Authorizations:</h5><svg class="sc-cBYhjr dJanPw" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></div><div class="sc-jRHPII vWkRk"><span class="sc-jHofgq wBUJC"><span class="sc-iHlJgr dmsgXw"><i>bearerAuth</i></span></span></div></div><div><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt gwrByh">path<!-- --> Parameters</h5><table class="sc-dENhDJ ceVHDP"><tbody><tr class="last "><td kind="field" title="job_id" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">job_id</span><div class="sc-xuUkR sc-hrDJJk bJcEcT gLEAmN">required</div></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->uuid<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;The job ID&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>The job ID</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div><h3 class="sc-gmSqAz eExJTr">Responses</h3><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa kzxcfX"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr fqtTpb" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">200<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Job status retrieved successfully&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Job status retrieved successfully</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">401<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication token&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication token</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">403<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Forbidden - user does not have access to this job&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Forbidden - user does not have access to this job</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">404<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Job not found&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Job not found</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">429<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the &lt;code&gt;Retry-After&lt;/code&gt; header to determine when to retry.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the <code>Retry-After</code> header to determine when to retry.</p>
</div></button></div></div></div><div class="sc-iKTcqh sc-gnpbhQ gZDnYl ilOHuQ"><div class="sc-eowDPD gzfevj"><button class="sc-oeqTF kUpURr"><span type="get" class="sc-ezTrPE kSShLn http-verb id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/cancelJob" data-section-id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/cancelJob" class="sc-dsLQwm kcRA-dj"><div data-section-id="operation/cancelJob" id="operation/cancelJob" class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/API-Endpoints/operation/cancelJob" aria-label="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/cancelJob"></a>Cancel job<!-- --> </h2><div class="sc-bQEQyQ iylDES"><div html="&lt;p&gt;Cancel a running job.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>Cancel a running job.</p>
</div></div><div class="sc-iWlrxG dtXtLd"><div class="sc-iRFtIJ fWpKsT"><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt sc-hWiVxH gwrByh hWyQJJ">Authorizations:</h5><svg class="sc-cBYhjr dJanPw" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></div><div class="sc-jRHPII vWkRk"><span class="sc-jHofgq wBUJC"><span class="sc-iHlJgr dmsgXw"><i>bearerAuth</i></span></span></div></div><div><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt gwrByh">path<!-- --> Parameters</h5><table class="sc-dENhDJ ceVHDP"><tbody><tr class="last "><td kind="field" title="job_id" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt kyrkfq bUksBx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><span class="property-name">job_id</span><div class="sc-xuUkR sc-hrDJJk bJcEcT gLEAmN">required</div></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">string</span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl"> <!-- -->&lt;<!-- -->uuid<!-- -->&gt;<!-- --> </span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;The job ID&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>The job ID</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div><h3 class="sc-gmSqAz eExJTr">Responses</h3><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa drimGB" disabled=""><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">204<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Job cancelled successfully&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Job cancelled successfully</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">401<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication token&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication token</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">403<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Forbidden - user does not have access to this job&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Forbidden - user does not have access to this job</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">404<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Job not found&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Job not found</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">429<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the &lt;code&gt;Retry-After&lt;/code&gt; header to determine when to retry.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the <code>Retry-After</code> header to determine when to retry.</p>
</div></button></div></div></div><div class="sc-iKTcqh sc-gnpbhQ gZDnYl ilOHuQ"><div class="sc-eowDPD gzfevj"><button class="sc-oeqTF kUpURr"><span type="delete" class="sc-ezTrPE jlixZX http-verb delete">delete</span><span class="sc-iAlELC fnjHPf">/jobs/{job_id}</span><svg class="sc-cBYhjr iMxoRf" style="margin-right:-25px" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="sc-drnuxz cBFiuk"><div class="sc-hDcvty foSvWH"><div html="" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"></div><div tabindex="0" role="button"><div class="sc-kGqRax bAnzrw"><span>https://descriptapi.com/v1</span>/jobs/{job_id}</div></div></div></div></div><div><h3 class="sc-kkmypM jKNCPF"> <!-- -->Response samples<!-- --> </h3><div class="sc-bSlUec eiAsom" data-rttabs="true"><ul class="react-tabs__tab-list" role="tablist"><li class="tab-error react-tabs__tab--selected" role="tab" id="tab:Rjjcsq:0" aria-selected="true" aria-disabled="false" aria-controls="panel:Rjjcsq:0" tabindex="0" data-rttab="true">401</li><li class="tab-error" role="tab" id="tab:Rjjcsq:1" aria-selected="false" aria-disabled="false" aria-controls="panel:Rjjcsq:1" data-rttab="true">403</li><li class="tab-error" role="tab" id="tab:Rjjcsq:2" aria-selected="false" aria-disabled="false" aria-controls="panel:Rjjcsq:2" data-rttab="true">404</li><li class="tab-error" role="tab" id="tab:Rjjcsq:3" aria-selected="false" aria-disabled="false" aria-controls="panel:Rjjcsq:3" data-rttab="true">429</li></ul><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel react-tabs__tab-panel--selected" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjjcsq:0" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjjcsq:0"><div><div class="sc-WChnI iLXIA-d"><span class="sc-foMnoT eIkhHQ">Content type</span><div class="sc-ZubPq hQugjE">application/json</div></div><div class="sc-AmOMz gDrQpr"><div class="sc-eTdEpr dgzSkD"><div class="sc-pFPEP hYOPWb"><button><div class="sc-eHujzY ecCAmX">Copy</div></button></div><div tabindex="0" class="sc-euGpHm fwfkcU sc-fTgapq bDqsIm"><div class="redoc-json"><code><button class="collapser" aria-label="collapse"></button><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="ellipsis"></span><ul class="obj collapsible"><li><div class="hoverable "><span class="property token string">"error"</span>: <span class="token string">&quot;unauthorized&quot;</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span></div></li><li><div class="hoverable "><span class="property token string">"message"</span>: <span class="token string">&quot;Missing or invalid authentication token&quot;</span></div></li></ul><span class="token punctuation">}</span></code></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjjcsq:1" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjjcsq:1"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjjcsq:2" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjjcsq:2"></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjjcsq:3" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjjcsq:3"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/getStatus" data-section-id="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/getStatus" class="sc-dsLQwm kcRA-dj"><div data-section-id="operation/getStatus" id="operation/getStatus" class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/API-Endpoints/operation/getStatus" aria-label="tag/API-Endpoints/operation/getStatus"></a>Check API status<!-- --> </h2><div class="sc-bQEQyQ iylDES"><div html="&lt;blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Work in progress&lt;/strong&gt; — This endpoint is not yet available and will return an error if called.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;/blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Check API availability and validate authentication token.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;This endpoint can be used to:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Verify that your authentication token is valid&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Check API connectivity without performing any heavy operations&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Returns a success response if the token is valid, or a 401 error if the token is invalid or missing.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><blockquote>
<p><strong>Work in progress</strong> — This endpoint is not yet available and will return an error if called.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Check API availability and validate authentication token.</p>
<p>This endpoint can be used to:</p>
<ul>
<li>Verify that your authentication token is valid</li>
<li>Check API connectivity without performing any heavy operations</li>
</ul>
<p>Returns a success response if the token is valid, or a 401 error if the token is invalid or missing.</p>
</div></div><div class="sc-iWlrxG dtXtLd"><div class="sc-iRFtIJ fWpKsT"><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt sc-hWiVxH gwrByh hWyQJJ">Authorizations:</h5><svg class="sc-cBYhjr dJanPw" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></div><div class="sc-jRHPII vWkRk"><span class="sc-jHofgq wBUJC"><span class="sc-iHlJgr dmsgXw"><i>bearerAuth</i></span></span></div></div><div><h3 class="sc-gmSqAz eExJTr">Responses</h3><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa kzxcfX"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr fqtTpb" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">200<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Token is valid and API is available&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Token is valid and API is available</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">401<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Unauthorized - missing or invalid authentication token&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Unauthorized - missing or invalid authentication token</p>
</div></button></div></div></div><div class="sc-iKTcqh sc-gnpbhQ gZDnYl ilOHuQ"><div class="sc-eowDPD gzfevj"><button class="sc-oeqTF kUpURr"><span type="get" class="sc-ezTrPE kSShLn http-verb get">get</span><span class="sc-iAlELC fnjHPf">/status</span><svg class="sc-cBYhjr iMxoRf" style="margin-right:-25px" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="sc-drnuxz cBFiuk"><div class="sc-hDcvty foSvWH"><div html="" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"></div><div tabindex="0" role="button"><div class="sc-kGqRax bAnzrw"><span>https://descriptapi.com/v1</span>/status</div></div></div></div></div><div><h3 class="sc-kkmypM jKNCPF"> <!-- -->Response samples<!-- --> </h3><div class="sc-bSlUec eiAsom" data-rttabs="true"><ul class="react-tabs__tab-list" role="tablist"><li class="tab-success react-tabs__tab--selected" role="tab" id="tab:Rjjksq:0" aria-selected="true" aria-disabled="false" aria-controls="panel:Rjjksq:0" tabindex="0" data-rttab="true">200</li><li class="tab-error" role="tab" id="tab:Rjjksq:1" aria-selected="false" aria-disabled="false" aria-controls="panel:Rjjksq:1" data-rttab="true">401</li></ul><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel react-tabs__tab-panel--selected" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjjksq:0" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjjksq:0"><div><div class="sc-WChnI iLXIA-d"><span class="sc-foMnoT eIkhHQ">Content type</span><div class="sc-ZubPq hQugjE">application/json</div></div><div class="sc-AmOMz gDrQpr"><div class="sc-eTdEpr dgzSkD"><div class="sc-pFPEP hYOPWb"><button><div class="sc-eHujzY ecCAmX">Copy</div></button></div><div tabindex="0" class="sc-euGpHm fwfkcU sc-fTgapq bDqsIm"><div class="redoc-json"><code><button class="collapser" aria-label="collapse"></button><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="ellipsis"></span><ul class="obj collapsible"><li><div class="hoverable "><span class="property token string">"status"</span>: <span class="token string">&quot;ok&quot;</span></div></li></ul><span class="token punctuation">}</span></code></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="react-tabs__tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel:Rjjksq:1" aria-labelledby="tab:Rjjksq:1"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div id="tag/Direct-file-upload" data-section-id="tag/Direct-file-upload" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Direct-file-upload" aria-label="tag/Direct-file-upload"></a>Direct file upload</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Instead of providing a public URL, you can upload files directly from your local machine using the &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/importProjectMedia&quot;&gt;import endpoint&lt;/a&gt;. The flow has three steps: request signed upload URLs, PUT your file bytes, then poll for completion.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>Instead of providing a public URL, you can upload files directly from your local machine using the <a href="#operation/importProjectMedia">import endpoint</a>. The flow has three steps: request signed upload URLs, PUT your file bytes, then poll for completion.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-1-Request-upload-URLs" data-section-id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-1-Request-upload-URLs" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-1-Request-upload-URLs" aria-label="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-1-Request-upload-URLs"></a>Step 1 — Request upload URLs</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Call the import endpoint with &lt;code&gt;content_type&lt;/code&gt; and &lt;code&gt;file_size&lt;/code&gt; instead of &lt;code&gt;url&lt;/code&gt; for each media item you want to upload directly.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Request&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-X&lt;/span&gt; POST https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/import/project_media &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-d&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&#x27;{
    &quot;project_name&quot;: &quot;My Upload Project&quot;,
    &quot;add_media&quot;: {
      &quot;recording.mp4&quot;: {
        &quot;content_type&quot;: &quot;video/mp4&quot;,
        &quot;file_size&quot;: 52428800
      }
    },
    &quot;add_compositions&quot;: [
      {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Main&quot;,
        &quot;clips&quot;: [
          { &quot;media&quot;: &quot;recording.mp4&quot; }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }&#x27;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The response includes an &lt;code&gt;upload_urls&lt;/code&gt; object keyed by media reference ID. Each entry contains a signed &lt;code&gt;upload_url&lt;/code&gt; (valid for 3 hours), plus &lt;code&gt;asset_id&lt;/code&gt; and &lt;code&gt;artifact_id&lt;/code&gt; for the created asset.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Response&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-json&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;job_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;project-media-import-a1b2c3d4&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;drive_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;c9c5c47e&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;project_url&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;upload_urls&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;recording.mp4&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;upload_url&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://storage.googleapis.com/bucket/...&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;asset_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;d4e5f6a7-1234-5678-9abc-def012345678&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;token string-property property&quot;&gt;&quot;artifact_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token operator&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;a1b2c3d4-5678-9abc-def0-123456789abc&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
"><p>Call the import endpoint with <code>content_type</code> and <code>file_size</code> instead of <code>url</code> for each media item you want to upload directly.</p>
<p><strong>Request</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> <span class="token parameter variable">-X</span> POST https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/import/project_media <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Content-Type: application/json"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-d</span> <span class="token string">'{
    "project_name": "My Upload Project",
    "add_media": {
      "recording.mp4": {
        "content_type": "video/mp4",
        "file_size": 52428800
      }
    },
    "add_compositions": [
      {
        "name": "Main",
        "clips": [
          { "media": "recording.mp4" }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }'</span>
</code></pre>
<p>The response includes an <code>upload_urls</code> object keyed by media reference ID. Each entry contains a signed <code>upload_url</code> (valid for 3 hours), plus <code>asset_id</code> and <code>artifact_id</code> for the created asset.</p>
<p><strong>Response</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-json"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"job_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"project-media-import-a1b2c3d4"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"drive_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"c9c5c47e"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"project_url"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"https://web.descript.com/e2f89ce6"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string-property property">"upload_urls"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token string-property property">"recording.mp4"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
      <span class="token string-property property">"upload_url"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"https://storage.googleapis.com/bucket/..."</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
      <span class="token string-property property">"asset_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"d4e5f6a7-1234-5678-9abc-def012345678"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
      <span class="token string-property property">"artifact_id"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"a1b2c3d4-5678-9abc-def0-123456789abc"</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></pre>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-2-Upload-the-file" data-section-id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-2-Upload-the-file" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-2-Upload-the-file" aria-label="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-2-Upload-the-file"></a>Step 2 — Upload the file</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;PUT the raw file bytes to the signed URL. Use &lt;code&gt;Content-Type: application/octet-stream&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-X&lt;/span&gt; PUT &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Content-Type: application/octet-stream&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  --data-binary @recording.mp4 &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://storage.googleapis.com/bucket/...&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The import job detects the upload automatically and begins processing.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>PUT the raw file bytes to the signed URL. Use <code>Content-Type: application/octet-stream</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> <span class="token parameter variable">-X</span> PUT <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Content-Type: application/octet-stream"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  --data-binary @recording.mp4 <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token string">"https://storage.googleapis.com/bucket/..."</span>
</code></pre>
<p>The import job detects the upload automatically and begins processing.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-3-Poll-for-completion" data-section-id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-3-Poll-for-completion" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-3-Poll-for-completion" aria-label="tag/Direct-file-upload/Step-3-Poll-for-completion"></a>Step 3 — Poll for completion</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Check the job status the same way as a URL-based import — poll the &lt;a href=&quot;#operation/getJob&quot;&gt;job status endpoint&lt;/a&gt; with the &lt;code&gt;job_id&lt;/code&gt;, or provide a &lt;code&gt;callback_url&lt;/code&gt; in the original request.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/project-media-import-a1b2c3d4 &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN&quot;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;When the job reaches &lt;code&gt;job_state: &amp;quot;stopped&amp;quot;&lt;/code&gt;, check &lt;code&gt;result.status&lt;/code&gt; for success or failure.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>Check the job status the same way as a URL-based import — poll the <a href="#operation/getJob">job status endpoint</a> with the <code>job_id</code>, or provide a <code>callback_url</code> in the original request.</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/project-media-import-a1b2c3d4 <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN"</span>
</code></pre>
<p>When the job reaches <code>job_state: &quot;stopped&quot;</code>, check <code>result.status</code> for success or failure.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Mixing-URL-imports-and-direct-uploads" data-section-id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Mixing-URL-imports-and-direct-uploads" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Direct-file-upload/Mixing-URL-imports-and-direct-uploads" aria-label="tag/Direct-file-upload/Mixing-URL-imports-and-direct-uploads"></a>Mixing URL imports and direct uploads</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;You can combine URL-based and direct upload media items in a single request. Items with &lt;code&gt;url&lt;/code&gt; are fetched server-side; items with &lt;code&gt;content_type&lt;/code&gt; and &lt;code&gt;file_size&lt;/code&gt; return signed upload URLs.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-X&lt;/span&gt; POST https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/import/project_media &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;\&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-d&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&#x27;{
    &quot;project_name&quot;: &quot;Mixed Import&quot;,
    &quot;add_media&quot;: {
      &quot;intro.mp4&quot;: {
        &quot;url&quot;: &quot;https://example.com/intro.mp4&quot;
      },
      &quot;recording.mp4&quot;: {
        &quot;content_type&quot;: &quot;video/mp4&quot;,
        &quot;file_size&quot;: 52428800
      }
    }
  }&#x27;&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The response will include &lt;code&gt;upload_urls&lt;/code&gt; only for the direct upload items.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>You can combine URL-based and direct upload media items in a single request. Items with <code>url</code> are fetched server-side; items with <code>content_type</code> and <code>file_size</code> return signed upload URLs.</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> <span class="token parameter variable">-X</span> POST https://descriptapi.com/v1/jobs/import/project_media <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Content-Type: application/json"</span> <span class="token punctuation">\</span>
  <span class="token parameter variable">-d</span> <span class="token string">'{
    "project_name": "Mixed Import",
    "add_media": {
      "intro.mp4": {
        "url": "https://example.com/intro.mp4"
      },
      "recording.mp4": {
        "content_type": "video/mp4",
        "file_size": 52428800
      }
    }
  }'</span>
</code></pre>
<p>The response will include <code>upload_urls</code> only for the direct upload items.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Required-fields" data-section-id="tag/Direct-file-upload/Required-fields" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Direct-file-upload/Required-fields" aria-label="tag/Direct-file-upload/Required-fields"></a>Required fields</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;table&gt;
&lt;thead&gt;
&lt;tr&gt;
&lt;th&gt;Field&lt;/th&gt;
&lt;th&gt;Type&lt;/th&gt;
&lt;th&gt;Description&lt;/th&gt;
&lt;/tr&gt;
&lt;/thead&gt;
&lt;tbody&gt;&lt;tr&gt;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;content_type&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;string&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;MIME type of the file (e.g., &lt;code&gt;video/mp4&lt;/code&gt;, &lt;code&gt;audio/wav&lt;/code&gt;)&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;/tr&gt;
&lt;tr&gt;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;file_size&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;integer&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;File size in bytes&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;/tr&gt;
&lt;tr&gt;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;language&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;string&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;em&gt;(optional)&lt;/em&gt; ISO 639-1 language code for transcription. Auto-detected if omitted.&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;/tr&gt;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&lt;/table&gt;
"><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody><tr>
<td><code>content_type</code></td>
<td>string</td>
<td>MIME type of the file (e.g., <code>video/mp4</code>, <code>audio/wav</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>file_size</code></td>
<td>integer</td>
<td>File size in bytes</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>language</code></td>
<td>string</td>
<td><em>(optional)</em> ISO 639-1 language code for transcription. Auto-detected if omitted.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Authentication" data-section-id="tag/Authentication" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Authentication" aria-label="tag/Authentication"></a>Authentication</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;The Descript API uses personal API tokens to authenticate requests. Tokens are scoped to a specific Drive and inherit your permissions on that Drive.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;To create a token, see the &lt;a href=&quot;#section/Getting-started/Create-an-API-token&quot;&gt;Getting Started&lt;/a&gt; guide.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Warning:&lt;/strong&gt; Treat your API token like a password. Anyone with your token can make API requests on your behalf using your account permissions. Never share your token publicly or commit it to source control.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;/blockquote&gt;
"><p>The Descript API uses personal API tokens to authenticate requests. Tokens are scoped to a specific Drive and inherit your permissions on that Drive.</p>
<p>To create a token, see the <a href="#section/Getting-started/Create-an-API-token">Getting Started</a> guide.</p>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Warning:</strong> Treat your API token like a password. Anyone with your token can make API requests on your behalf using your account permissions. Never share your token publicly or commit it to source control.</p>
</blockquote>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Authentication/Using-your-token" data-section-id="tag/Authentication/Using-your-token" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Authentication/Using-your-token" aria-label="tag/Authentication/Using-your-token"></a>Using your token</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;Include the token as a Bearer token in the &lt;code&gt;Authorization&lt;/code&gt; header of your API requests.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Example&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code class=&quot;language-bash&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token function&quot;&gt;curl&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token parameter variable&quot;&gt;-H&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN&quot;&lt;/span&gt; https://descriptapi.com/v1/status
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
"><p>Include the token as a Bearer token in the <code>Authorization</code> header of your API requests.</p>
<p><strong>Example</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="token function">curl</span> <span class="token parameter variable">-H</span> <span class="token string">"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN"</span> https://descriptapi.com/v1/status
</code></pre>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Rate-Limiting" data-section-id="tag/Rate-Limiting" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Rate-Limiting" aria-label="tag/Rate-Limiting"></a>Rate Limiting</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;The Descript API implements rate limiting to ensure fair usage and protect service availability.
When you exceed the rate limit, the API returns a &lt;code&gt;429 Too Many Requests&lt;/code&gt; response.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>The Descript API implements rate limiting to ensure fair usage and protect service availability.
When you exceed the rate limit, the API returns a <code>429 Too Many Requests</code> response.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Rate-Limiting/Rate-Limit-Headers" data-section-id="tag/Rate-Limiting/Rate-Limit-Headers" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Rate-Limiting/Rate-Limit-Headers" aria-label="tag/Rate-Limiting/Rate-Limit-Headers"></a>Rate Limit Headers</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;When a rate limit is exceeded, the response includes the following headers:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;table&gt;
&lt;thead&gt;
&lt;tr&gt;
&lt;th&gt;Header&lt;/th&gt;
&lt;th&gt;Description&lt;/th&gt;
&lt;/tr&gt;
&lt;/thead&gt;
&lt;tbody&gt;&lt;tr&gt;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;Retry-After&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;/tr&gt;
&lt;tr&gt;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;X-RateLimit-Remaining&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;Number of requests remaining in the current window&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;/tr&gt;
&lt;tr&gt;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;X-RateLimit-Consumed&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;td&gt;Number of requests consumed in the current window&lt;/td&gt;
&lt;/tr&gt;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&lt;/table&gt;
"><p>When a rate limit is exceeded, the response includes the following headers:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Header</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody><tr>
<td><code>Retry-After</code></td>
<td>Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>X-RateLimit-Remaining</code></td>
<td>Number of requests remaining in the current window</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>X-RateLimit-Consumed</code></td>
<td>Number of requests consumed in the current window</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Rate-Limiting/Handling-Rate-Limits" data-section-id="tag/Rate-Limiting/Handling-Rate-Limits" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-dnaUSb kprWUf"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Rate-Limiting/Handling-Rate-Limits" aria-label="tag/Rate-Limiting/Handling-Rate-Limits"></a>Handling Rate Limits</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;p&gt;When you receive a &lt;code&gt;429&lt;/code&gt; response, use the &lt;code&gt;Retry-After&lt;/code&gt; header to determine how long to wait before retrying.
This approach is more efficient than using fixed delays or exponential backoff alone.&lt;/p&gt;
"><p>When you receive a <code>429</code> response, use the <code>Retry-After</code> header to determine how long to wait before retrying.
This approach is more efficient than using fixed delays or exponential backoff alone.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Edit-in-Descript" data-section-id="tag/Edit-in-Descript" class="sc-dsLQwm diwyyM"><div class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Edit-in-Descript" aria-label="tag/Edit-in-Descript"></a>Edit in Descript</h2></div></div><div class="sc-fQpRED gxopqJ"><div class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG redoc-markdown " html="&lt;blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Note:&lt;/strong&gt; The Edit in Descript integration requires contacting Descript for access. &lt;a href=&quot;https://descript.com/api&quot;&gt;Reach out to us&lt;/a&gt; to get started.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;/blockquote&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Edit in Descript API enables partners to give their users the ability to transfer audio or video content to Descript for editing.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Edit in Descript buttons work by generating one-time use, public Import URLs to the Descript import UI that users
can be automatically sent to. On that page, they can make a few simple selections before kicking off a Partner cloud
storage to Descript cloud storage transfer. This will redirect them to a Descript Project ready for editing.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Partners can initiate the request by securely sending an information schema backend-to-backend to the Descript API
using a token, in exchange for the Import URL to redirect the user. Partners do not need to store this schema, as
Descript will do so and use it to start fetching the files when the user confirms the action&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ol&gt;
&lt;li&gt;When a user clicks &lt;code&gt;Edit in Descript&lt;/code&gt;, partner&amp;#39;s backend service makes POST request to:
 &lt;code&gt;https://descriptapi.com/v1/edit_in_descript/schema&lt;/code&gt; with an authorization bearer token header and JSON schema body&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Descript responds with either an Import URL or an error&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Partner redirects the user&amp;#39;s browser to the URL returned in step 2 or display an error message and link to help documentation&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ol&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;partner-user-experience&quot;&gt;Partner User Experience&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Some guidelines for partners as you consider this integration:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;We recommend placing the &lt;code&gt;Edit in Descript&lt;/code&gt; option next to your download options&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;If you offer multiple download options, such as combined vs. split audio/video files, we recommend placing
this integration clearly in context with each option, or only the supported option, to help users understand
what will be exported.&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Each time you request an import link, a new one is generated. Import links expire after 3 hours. After using an
import link, the only way to find an imported Project again is in Descript.&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;If an import link has expired or the contents of the schema has changed, please request a new import link with
the updated schema. This will create a new Descript Project when used.&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;We will provide Descript-branded assets to fit your proposed placement of the &lt;code&gt;Edit in Descript&lt;/code&gt; CTA and ask
that you don&amp;#39;t edit the assets beyond what we provide. We are happy to work with you on getting you the right
assets for your placement.&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Partners should provide error-handling for the POST request, at minimum displaying a generic error message and
linking to a help article (we can provide a link for this if you prefer).&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Progress will be conveyed to the user in the Descript side of the user experience.&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;descript-user-experience&quot;&gt;Descript User Experience&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;When users are directed to a Descript Import URL, they&amp;#39;ll be asked to either create an account or login in order
to proceed.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Next, they will be presented with a few options about how they&amp;#39;d like to import the data, such as where the new
Descript Project should be created.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;They&amp;#39;ll then be redirected to the Project, where they can monitor the progress of the import and start editing.&lt;/p&gt;
"><blockquote>
<p><strong>Note:</strong> The Edit in Descript integration requires contacting Descript for access. <a href="https://descript.com/api">Reach out to us</a> to get started.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Edit in Descript API enables partners to give their users the ability to transfer audio or video content to Descript for editing.</p>
<p>Edit in Descript buttons work by generating one-time use, public Import URLs to the Descript import UI that users
can be automatically sent to. On that page, they can make a few simple selections before kicking off a Partner cloud
storage to Descript cloud storage transfer. This will redirect them to a Descript Project ready for editing.</p>
<p>Partners can initiate the request by securely sending an information schema backend-to-backend to the Descript API
using a token, in exchange for the Import URL to redirect the user. Partners do not need to store this schema, as
Descript will do so and use it to start fetching the files when the user confirms the action</p>
<ol>
<li>When a user clicks <code>Edit in Descript</code>, partner&#39;s backend service makes POST request to:
 <code>https://descriptapi.com/v1/edit_in_descript/schema</code> with an authorization bearer token header and JSON schema body</li>
<li>Descript responds with either an Import URL or an error</li>
<li>Partner redirects the user&#39;s browser to the URL returned in step 2 or display an error message and link to help documentation</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="partner-user-experience">Partner User Experience</h3>
<p>Some guidelines for partners as you consider this integration:</p>
<ul>
<li>We recommend placing the <code>Edit in Descript</code> option next to your download options<ul>
<li>If you offer multiple download options, such as combined vs. split audio/video files, we recommend placing
this integration clearly in context with each option, or only the supported option, to help users understand
what will be exported.</li>
<li>Each time you request an import link, a new one is generated. Import links expire after 3 hours. After using an
import link, the only way to find an imported Project again is in Descript.</li>
<li>If an import link has expired or the contents of the schema has changed, please request a new import link with
the updated schema. This will create a new Descript Project when used.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>We will provide Descript-branded assets to fit your proposed placement of the <code>Edit in Descript</code> CTA and ask
that you don&#39;t edit the assets beyond what we provide. We are happy to work with you on getting you the right
assets for your placement.</li>
<li>Partners should provide error-handling for the POST request, at minimum displaying a generic error message and
linking to a help article (we can provide a link for this if you prefer).</li>
<li>Progress will be conveyed to the user in the Descript side of the user experience.</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="descript-user-experience">Descript User Experience</h3>
<p>When users are directed to a Descript Import URL, they&#39;ll be asked to either create an account or login in order
to proceed.</p>
<p>Next, they will be presented with a few options about how they&#39;d like to import the data, such as where the new
Descript Project should be created.</p>
<p>They&#39;ll then be redirected to the Project, where they can monitor the progress of the import and start editing.</p>
</div></div></div><div id="tag/Edit-in-Descript/operation/postEditInDescriptSchema" data-section-id="tag/Edit-in-Descript/operation/postEditInDescriptSchema" class="sc-dsLQwm kcRA-dj"><div data-section-id="operation/postEditInDescriptSchema" id="operation/postEditInDescriptSchema" class="sc-la-DxNn dSIRVR"><div class="sc-fQpRED htdgPt"><h2 class="sc-knesRu fWNqUq"><a class="sc-jCbFiK hSvuOo" href="#tag/Edit-in-Descript/operation/postEditInDescriptSchema" aria-label="tag/Edit-in-Descript/operation/postEditInDescriptSchema"></a>Create Import URL<!-- --> </h2><div class="sc-bQEQyQ iylDES"><div html="&lt;p&gt;Create an Import URL by sending a Project schema to Descript API from your service&amp;#39;s backend.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;import-schema&quot;&gt;Import Schema&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Our import schemas are specified as a minimal JSON list of files which is detailed in full at the bottom of this
section. At it&amp;#39;s smallest, the request body looks like:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;pre&gt;&lt;code&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;partner_drive_id&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;162c61d1-6ced-4b25-a622-7dba922983ee&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;project_schema&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;schema_version&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;1.0.0&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;files&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;[&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;{&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;uri&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;token string&quot;&gt;&quot;https://descriptusercontent.com/jane.wav?signature=d182bca64bf94a1483d2fd16b579f955&quot;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;]&lt;/span&gt;
  &lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;span class=&quot;token punctuation&quot;&gt;}&lt;/span&gt;
&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/pre&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;file-access&quot;&gt;File Access&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The file paths provided in the schema need to either be public or pre-signed URIs with enough time before
expiration for failures and retries, we suggest URIs that won&amp;#39;t expire for 48 hours. We ask that the files have
already been saved when the import link is generated to minimize cases where we&amp;#39;re waiting for eventually
consistent storage of files that will never be written. We will, however, wait for eventual consistency of the
storage layer and retry fetching files before eventually timing out.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Files must be hosted on preapproved hosts as our import process has an allow list which it checks URIs against.
Files will be requested with &lt;code&gt;User-Agent: Descriptbot/1.0&lt;/code&gt; (version may change) for tracking purposes.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;import-link-expiration&quot;&gt;Import link expiration&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Import links are no longer valid after a user imports their data once. Viewing an already used import link will
not allow for importing again and will not provide access to a previously created Descript Project. Partners are
able to generate a new import link at any time, regardless of if a previous import link has been used.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The API does not currently provide partners with a link to the Descript Project, though users will be redirected
to it from Descript&amp;#39;s web interface the first time they import files, and can always find the Project in Descript.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Import links expire after 3 hours and attempting to use an import link after the pre-signed links in the schema
file have expired will result in an error, so we recommend generating the import link after the user has clicked
the Edit in Descript button.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;h3 id=&quot;supported-media-specification&quot;&gt;Supported media specification&lt;/h3&gt;
&lt;p&gt;We recommend sending the highest quality, uncompressed versions of files available to you. If you have multiple
tracks, we recommend prioritizing sending us the full multi-track sequence over a combined file.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Audio: WAV, FLAC, AAC, MP3&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Video: h264, HEVC (container: MOV, MP4)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU grYsmG"><p>Create an Import URL by sending a Project schema to Descript API from your service&#39;s backend.</p>
<h3 id="import-schema">Import Schema</h3>
<p>Our import schemas are specified as a minimal JSON list of files which is detailed in full at the bottom of this
section. At it&#39;s smallest, the request body looks like:</p>
<pre><code><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token string">"partner_drive_id"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token string">"162c61d1-6ced-4b25-a622-7dba922983ee"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token string">"project_schema"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token string">"schema_version"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token string">"1.0.0"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token string">"files"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"uri"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token string">"https://descriptusercontent.com/jane.wav?signature=d182bca64bf94a1483d2fd16b579f955"</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></pre>
<h3 id="file-access">File Access</h3>
<p>The file paths provided in the schema need to either be public or pre-signed URIs with enough time before
expiration for failures and retries, we suggest URIs that won&#39;t expire for 48 hours. We ask that the files have
already been saved when the import link is generated to minimize cases where we&#39;re waiting for eventually
consistent storage of files that will never be written. We will, however, wait for eventual consistency of the
storage layer and retry fetching files before eventually timing out.</p>
<p>Files must be hosted on preapproved hosts as our import process has an allow list which it checks URIs against.
Files will be requested with <code>User-Agent: Descriptbot/1.0</code> (version may change) for tracking purposes.</p>
<h3 id="import-link-expiration">Import link expiration</h3>
<p>Import links are no longer valid after a user imports their data once. Viewing an already used import link will
not allow for importing again and will not provide access to a previously created Descript Project. Partners are
able to generate a new import link at any time, regardless of if a previous import link has been used.</p>
<p>The API does not currently provide partners with a link to the Descript Project, though users will be redirected
to it from Descript&#39;s web interface the first time they import files, and can always find the Project in Descript.</p>
<p>Import links expire after 3 hours and attempting to use an import link after the pre-signed links in the schema
file have expired will result in an error, so we recommend generating the import link after the user has clicked
the Edit in Descript button.</p>
<h3 id="supported-media-specification">Supported media specification</h3>
<p>We recommend sending the highest quality, uncompressed versions of files available to you. If you have multiple
tracks, we recommend prioritizing sending us the full multi-track sequence over a combined file.</p>
<ul>
<li>Audio: WAV, FLAC, AAC, MP3</li>
<li>Video: h264, HEVC (container: MOV, MP4)</li>
</ul>
</div></div><div class="sc-iWlrxG dtXtLd"><div class="sc-iRFtIJ fWpKsT"><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt sc-hWiVxH gwrByh hWyQJJ">Authorizations:</h5><svg class="sc-cBYhjr dJanPw" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></div><div class="sc-jRHPII vWkRk"><span class="sc-jHofgq wBUJC"><span class="sc-iHlJgr dmsgXw"><i>bearerAuth</i></span></span></div></div><h5 class="sc-dkjaqt gwrByh">Request Body schema: <span class="sc-dwYcXH fafqZb">application/json</span><div class="sc-xuUkR sc-hrDJJk sc-dCKixA bJcEcT gLEAmN jBQHJa">required</div></h5><div html="&lt;p&gt;Edit in Descript schema POST body.&lt;/p&gt;

" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>The drive id associated with the auth token.</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr><tr class="last "><td kind="field" title="project_schema" class="sc-tOkKi sc-epPVmt sc-hxyskk kyrkfq bUksBx iDNWxx"><span class="sc-hfvVTD ggWcKa"></span><button aria-label="expand project_schema"><span class="property-name">project_schema</span><svg class="sc-cBYhjr MHxpd" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></button><div class="sc-xuUkR sc-hrDJJk bJcEcT gLEAmN">required</div></td><td class="sc-fpSrms dZdekA"><div><div><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-cvzDha bJcEcT CSObx"></span><span class="sc-xuUkR sc-gKROGD bJcEcT eotqsl">object</span></div> <div><div html="&lt;p&gt;The Project schema&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"><p>The Project schema</p>
</div></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table><div><h3 class="sc-gmSqAz eExJTr">Responses</h3><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa kzxcfX"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr fqtTpb" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">201<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Successful operation.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Successful operation.</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa ipIsxn" disabled=""><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">400<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Invalid input.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Invalid input.</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa ipIsxn" disabled=""><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">403<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Associated drive does not have Edit in Descript permissions.&lt;/p&gt;
" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Associated drive does not have Edit in Descript permissions.</p>
</div></button></div><div><button class="sc-kuDXwa dopJqN"><svg class="sc-cBYhjr ezFOZv" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg><strong class="sc-eiLgtK DzZni">429<!-- --> </strong><div html="&lt;p&gt;Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.

" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG sc-dHrNzZ fwfkcU chqdlI dRdjww"><p>Too many requests - rate limit exceeded.
Use the <code>Retry-After</code> header to determine when to retry.</p>
</div></button></div></div></div><div class="sc-iKTcqh sc-gnpbhQ gZDnYl ilOHuQ"><div class="sc-eowDPD gzfevj"><button class="sc-oeqTF kUpURr"><span type="post" class="sc-ezTrPE iTvTLp http-verb post">post</span><span class="sc-iAlELC fnjHPf">/edit_in_descript/schema</span><svg class="sc-cBYhjr iMxoRf" style="margin-right:-25px" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 24 24" x="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="0" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="17.3 8.3 12 13.6 6.7 8.3 5.3 9.7 12 16.4 18.7 9.7 "></polygon></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="sc-drnuxz cBFiuk"><div class="sc-hDcvty foSvWH"><div html="" class="sc-euGpHm sc-exayXG fwfkcU dXUJIw"></div><div tabindex="0" role="button"><div class="sc-kGqRax bAnzrw"><span>https://descriptapi.com/v1</span>/edit_in_descript/schema</div></div></div></div></div><div><h3 class="sc-kkmypM jKNCPF"> <!-- -->Request samples<!-- --> </h3><div class="sc-bSlUec eiAsom" data-rttabs="true"><ul class="react-tabs__tab-list" role="tablist"><li class="react-tabs__tab react-tabs__tab--selected" role="tab" id="tab:R2aeda:0" aria-selected="true" aria-disabled="false" class="token string">&quot;</span><a href="https://descriptusercontent.com/jane.wav?signature=d182bca64bf94a1483d2fd16b579f955">https://descriptusercontent.com/jane.wav?signature=d182bca64bf94a1483d2fd16b579f955</a><span class="token string">&quot;</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span></div></li><li><div class="hoverable collapsed"><span class="property token string">"start_offset"</span>: <button class="collapser"
